svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Smart Garage Architecture" id="-_Ts9JrtTI8P5MGkTNsF"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="527" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Vehicle Detection Module
(Ultrasonic Sensors)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Environmental Monitoring Module
(Temperature / Humidity Sensor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="160" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="User Interface Module
(Buttons + LEDs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="640" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="STM32 NUCLEO-U545RE-Q
Main Control Unit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="380" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Actuator Control Module
(Fan Motor + Garage Lights)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="260" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Networking Module
(W5500 Ethernet)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="530" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Laptop Dashboard
Real-Time Monitoring" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="540" y="545" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-9" edge="1" parent="1" source="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-2" target="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-10" edge="1" parent="1" source="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-3" target="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-11" edge="1" parent="1" source="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-4" target="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-12" edge="1" parent="1" source="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-5" target="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-5" target="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-7" target="3d83Q1nPimSnXRf70ATs-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
